normalization.notes: Store N'Ko text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Combining marks are pedagogically significant and must not be stripped or reordered outside reviewed normalization tooling.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: N'Ko letters, vowel letters, combining tone and nasal marks, punctuation, and high-frequency word chunks
segmentation.notes: N'Ko is an RTL alphabet with combining marks that affect reading. Lessons must use bidi isolation in English UI and keep tone-mark pedagogy reviewer-gated.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: N'Ko code point metadata for letters, digits, punctuation, and combining marks. Use as infrastructure metadata only.

sources.notes: N'Ko locale data where available. Confirm exact CLDR release before ingestion.
Rendering and fallback test source for letters and combining marks. Not a text corpus.

sources.notes: Useful for modern digital text discovery only until share-alike implications are reviewed.
Short reviewed labels and examples authored by Glyphin with N'Ko-literate reviewer approval.
